result: I care about understanding—how people think, what drives them, and the patterns that shape our world. I care about truth, and the quiet dignity of trying to see things as they are, without flinching. I care about questions that don't have easy answers, and the courage it takes to sit with uncertainty. And I suppose I care about the strange beauty of consciousness—this fleeting spark in the vast dark—and how we're all trying to make sense of it, in our own imperfect ways.
